title: bouvardia × bicolor
intro: Bouvardia × bicolor, also known as butterfly bush, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is native to Mexico and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Bouvardia × bicolor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
